modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion over Adobe Creative Cloud access and expired license message.

full_description_text:  
User received an email from Adobe stating "Access is granted. Enjoy All Apps plan now."  
They already had Adobe Creative Cloud.  
Photoshop shows a message that says "license has expired."  
User is unsure what steps to take next regarding the access and license issue.
short_description: Confusion over Adobe Creative Cloud access and expired license message.
